welcome.title: Welcome to Forgify
welcome.sub: A local-first AI agent workspace. Drive it with natural language, and distill the work into reusable tools.
features: Describe a goal; the agent picks tools, writes code, runs workflows.
Build Functions, Handlers, Workflows — with built-in versioning and rollback.
Data lives on your machine. No cloud upload, no login.

workspace.title: Create a workspace
workspace.sub: Name your workspace. Add or switch more later in Settings; each one's data is isolated.
workspace.label: Workspace name
workspace.hint: Shown at the bottom of the sidebar. Switching swaps only that workspace's data.

appearance.title: Appearance & language
appearance.sub: Language and theme follow your system by default. Adjust anytime — all of this lives in Settings.

model.title: Configure a model
model.sub: Pick a provider, enter an API key, verify, then choose a model. You can also do this later in Settings.
model.verifyFail: Verification failed — check the API key.

search.title: Web search
search.sub: Configure a search provider and the agent can browse the web. Optional — add it later in Settings.
search.keyPlaceholder: Enter a key, or skip this step

done.title: All set
done.sub: Everything's ready. Start your first conversation, or have the agent build your first tool.
